title: Greened House Anthracite Heated Towel Rail 400mm W x 800mm H Flat Central Heating Wall Mounted Towel Radiator (400mm W x 800mm H Flat)
features: BEAUTIFULLY DESIGNED HIGH QUALITY FINISH - Greened House Anthracite towel rails are designed to be not only beautiful to look at but very practical to use and will enhance the look of your bathroom with a high quality finish that’s second to none.

HIGH HEAT OUTPUT - These Central Heating towel rails are unlike allot of our competitors as they have more cross bars so giving you lots of heat in your bathroom. This will ensure that not only do you dry your towels, but you will also get heat given off to your bathroom.

HIGH QUALITY PAINTING - Greened house towel rails are made from low carbon steel which is pre treated with Iron phosphate to give maximum rust protection before being painted with tough hard wearing powder coat to give you the maximum corrosion resistance.

TECHNICAL INFORMATION - 400mm wide x 800mm tall, Heat Output 825 BTU/ 241W, Pipe Centres 350mm ,Distance from the wall to the front of the rail is adjustable between 87 and 110mm, CE and EN442 certified, Maximum working pressure 8 bar, ½”bsp water connections, 22mm diameter cross tubes, Powder Coated mild steel.
GUARANTEE - 5 Year Guarantee for your peace of mind.

NO HIDDEN EXTRAS - All our towel rails are supplied with everything you need to fit the rail to the wall. It comes adjustable wall brackets, wall fixing screws and wall plugs, and blanking plug and air vent.
description: Product Description Greened House Anthracite Central Heating Towel Rails Available in Flat and Curved Bar High Quality Anthracite Powder Coated Steel Manufactured from anthracite powder coated steel, this central heating towel rail is designed for use in both domestic and commercial wet central heating systems. The rail is made from low carbon steel which is pre treated with Iron phosphate to give maximum rust protection before being painted with tough hard wearing anthracite powder coat to give you the maximum corrosion resistance. Elegant Design Its elegant shape with round cross tubes is simple yet modern and will add a touch of class to any style of bathroom. Designed to ensure plenty of slots to hang towels, it is also designed to give maximum heat output while still being practical to use and is sufficient to supply heat to a bathroom. This central heating towel rail is designed for use in both domestic and commercial wet central heating systems. Technical Information Pipe centres 455mm. Distance from the wall to the front of the rail is adjustable between 87 and 110mm. Powder Coated mild steel. 22mm diameter cross tubes. Maximum working pressure 8 bar. ½”bsp water connections. Additional information Type Heated Towel Rail Colour Anthracite Brand Greened House Style Modern Mounted Wall Mounted
